title: Believe Mod
description:
The Believe Mod is a mod that adds new blocks and 3D models to make your medieval world come to life! 
This mod aims to make Minecraft even more realistic and immersive, especially in a medieval/fantasy environment.
body:
# Believe Mod

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f98e29940f5179167a3366565360f0256810cdc.png)

**Believe Mod** enhances Minecraft with a massive collection of medieval and fantasy building blocks, detailed 3D models, and immersive textures designed to bring realism and atmosphere to your worlds.

Perfect for:

- Castles and fortresses  
- Medieval towns and villages  
- Fantasy environments  
- Roleplay servers and cinematic builds  

---

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cba2cf329ad5212ef8a2b72c6d2f2cbc6d6aece.png)

- **600+ Custom Blocks**
- Over **40,000+ blockstates**
- Structural pieces, arches, beams, furniture, tools, and more
- Designed specifically for medieval and fantasy building

## High-Quality Models & Textures
- Gritty medieval aesthetic
- Detailed 3D geometry
- Carefully crafted textures for realism and immersion
- Built to blend naturally into detailed environments

## Regular Updates
- Frequent new content
- Continuous improvements and fixes
- Expanding feature roadmap

---

# Requirements

- Minecraft **Fabric**(If Applicable)
- **Fabric Loader 0.14.22+**(If Applicable)

---

# Compatibility

Believe Mod is designed to work smoothly with:

- Fabric Modpacks
- Forge Modpacks  
- Medieval-style content mods  
- Custom building environments  

Created with the **Elmorin Refabricated** ecosystem in mind.

---

# Community & Support

![Support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2eefb715d60c244bfdd293a9be5e74debde26de.png)

Stay connected and support development:

- **Patreon:** https://www.patreon.com/legendaryporpoise  
- **Twitter/X:** https://twitter.com/LegendaryPorp  
- **YouTube:** https://www.youtube.com/@LegendaryPorpoise

Your support helps bring new blocks and features to the mod.

---

# Contributors

- TomWTG  
- AdamJ  
- Kara  

Art created using Inkarnate.

---
